plugins.name: todo
plugins.description: Show actionable items from TODO.md with smart filtering, optional Apple Reminders sync, and today's Google Calendar events.

plugins.name: email
plugins.description: Summarize recent unread Gmail messages, filtering out promotions/notifications/security alerts.

plugins.name: wrap
plugins.description: Summarize the current conversation and append it to ./memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md so future sessions can recover context.
